CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-14-2026 Continued To Jul-15-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2026 Continued To May-27-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Or Dismiss For Forum Non Conveniens
Off Calendar Feb-17-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ENVISTA FORENSICS, LLC'S, A GEORGIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, Motion To Stay Or Dismiss For Forum Non Conveniens.

Defendant Envista Forensics, LLC et al's motion to dismiss or stay for forum non conveniens is denied. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
